content.query:
CREATE VIEW BI_CustomerPriceLists
-- drop view BI_CustomerPriceLists

AS

SELECT
    OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number],
    OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name],
    OC.CFC8 AS [Price List Market],
    CS.TX15 AS [Delivery Terms],
    2 AS [Priority],
    PLT2.PLTB AS [Price List Tab],
    PLT2.PRRF AS [Base Price List],
    PRL.ITNO AS [Item Number],
    PRL.SAPR AS [Customer Price],
    PRL.LMDT AS [Change Date],
    PRL.CHNO AS [Change Number],
    PRL.CHID AS [Change By],
    PRL.FVDT AS [Valid From],
    PRL.LVDT AS [Valid To],
    MM.SAPR AS [Sales Price],
    CASE
        WHEN PRL.LVDT < CAST(GETDATE() AS date) THEN 'Expired'
        WHEN PRL.FVDT > CAST(GETDATE() AS date) THEN 'Future'
        WHEN PRL.FVDT <= CAST(GETDATE() AS date) AND PRL.LVDT >= CAST(GETDATE() AS date) THEN 'Current'
        ELSE 'Review'
    END AS [Price List Status]

FROM M3.OCUSMA OC
JOIN M3.OPRMTX PLT2 ON OC.PLTB = PLT2.PLTB AND OC.CUNO = PLT2.OBV1 AND PLT2.PREX = 2
JOIN M3.OPRBAS PRL ON PRL.PRRF = PLT2.PRRF
LEFT JOIN M3.MITMAS MM ON PRL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN M3.CSYTAB CS ON OC.TEDL = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'TEDL'
WHERE OC.STAT = 20

UNION ALL

SELECT
    OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number],
    OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name],
    OC.CFC8 AS [Price List Market],
    CS.TX15 AS [Delivery Terms],
    6 AS [Priority],
    PLT6.PLTB AS [Price List Tab],
    PLT6.PRRF AS [Base Price List],
    PRL.ITNO AS [Item Number],
    PRL.SAPR AS [Customer Price],
    PRL.LMDT AS [Change Date],
    PRL.CHNO AS [Change Number],
    PRL.CHID AS [Change By],
    PRL.FVDT AS [Valid From],
    PRL.LVDT AS [Valid To],
    MM.SAPR AS [Sales Price],
    CASE
        WHEN PRL.LVDT < CAST(GETDATE() AS date) THEN 'Expired'
        WHEN PRL.FVDT > CAST(GETDATE() AS date) THEN 'Future'
        WHEN PRL.FVDT <= CAST(GETDATE() AS date) AND PRL.LVDT >= CAST(GETDATE() AS date) THEN 'Current'
        ELSE 'Review'
    END AS [Price List Status]

FROM M3.OCUSMA OC
JOIN M3.OPRMTX PLT6 ON OC.PLTB = PLT6.PLTB AND OC.CFC8 = PLT6.OBV1 AND PLT6.PREX = 6
JOIN M3.OPRBAS PRL ON PRL.PRRF = PLT6.PRRF
LEFT JOIN M3.MITMAS MM ON PRL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN M3.CSYTAB CS ON OC.TEDL = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'TEDL'
WHERE OC.STAT = 20
